summary: Script + workflow are well-structured with good error handling, but maintainability concerns exist: implicit TSV format (lines 154–178) is fragile, validation lacks JSON schema checks (line 134), keep-latest/max-total-size policies (lines 210–286) are dense, awk JSON assembly (lines 303–314) bypasses jq, and workflow has apt-get duplication (lines 59–67, 89–94).
